newsitems.title: Our Game Finally Reached #1 on Steam’s Upcoming FPS Chart!
newsitems.author: 笔下无江南
newsitems.contents: Today, I opened Steam and saw that my game, Bodycam On Record, had reached #1 on the Upcoming FPS Games chart.Honestly, I still can’t believe it.After graduating, I turned down offers from major game companies because I didn’t want to work on cash-grab mobile games. Instead, I chose to pursue the kind of game I genuinely wanted to make.The past few years haven’t been easy. My career didn’t go as planned, and there were countless moments when I questioned whether I had made the right choice.But seeing this result today made me feel that perhaps all those years of persistence are finally about to pay off.Of course, this is only an upcoming-games ranking. Whether the game can truly succeed and earn players’ recognition will depend on what happens after release. But for this moment, I want to let myself celebrate.Thank you to everyone who has followed, wishlisted, and supported Bodycam On Record. I hope this unexpected stroke of good luck reaches every one of you who is still pursuing a dream.May we all live to see the day our persistence pays off. ❤️ To celebrate this moment, I’m giving away 66 Steam keys!I added “(Bot)” to the middle of each key to prevent bots from stealing them. Please remove “(Bot)” before activation. If you redeem a key, please leave a comment to let everyone know it has been claimed.A2GE6-(Bot)YW3I8-WGRIH TYNKB-(Bot)WQ40P-EVINH I2ZNP-(Bot)63GN8-46978 MQJ8E-(Bot)Z50CT-FNAVT M2BZD-(Bot)T35WF-N6WEL ZC9WF-(Bot)4GQND-R3QGV V8DYK-(Bot)ZVGFG-PAFIE JKTX3-(Bot)MLBI5-AW6HQ MZTJ7-(Bot)FPA4E-CNFNQ RVWX4-(Bot)PGYKB-6XLAB GTQMC-(Bot)HZIVT-87R2B 86JD8-(Bot)Z23D4-6IYRE BBEDQ-(Bot)QC242-XK2IJ K6QQI-(Bot)VAR85-IKJ9F JPW80-(Bot)TIJXZ-W3DIF EMVZQ-(Bot)IZW63-NB626 Q98T0-(Bot)30GRA-CRR2C C8AET-(Bot)NMHXD-MDYTP 6RL68-(Bot)I9FGN-FRBTE 2ZN6Y-(Bot)2RVPL-ITCYP PYWJE-(Bot)02C96-F4Z7Y 50BQ6-(Bot)H8BN3-EZR6G 3TAYQ-(Bot)A0FBN-LH2VY 39KXQ-(Bot)XXZRT-9IQFE 6QPJ2-(Bot)BA3IE-K3HA2 8QNKT-(Bot)GBK5Z-4XAT5 P82MJ-(Bot)PBKJT-F4848 99RDJ-(Bot)C8DCL-G6A6V 6BLI9-(Bot)MLC8L-AXA0Y 4KETP-(Bot)664Y8-M6LTI GXVYB-(Bot)F53PM-QNI60 KDWEN-(Bot)A5W5D-XGXR3 3BGPG-(Bot)0HXIT-ZR5T4 0X8V2-(Bot)YNIEE-QK208 27LTA-(Bot)M4XAG-JGJPB T0IYC-(Bot)MWIJV-GEVWM 3XP53-(Bot)ZJ7QD-IDDMH V8L5Y-(Bot)D8Y75-6ABLQ VZADR-(Bot)EEIEK-40CA6 DV43T-(Bot)DBC0X-D2ZT0 CLX4I-(Bot)IBFE9-L9HZA M0DIW-(Bot)DIL27-Y3WRE KZZVN-(Bot)K3QE9-38V54 8JN5C-(Bot)ZLZHW-8MX99 0IN9J-(Bot)LRQY5-NQB0X EG8D2-(Bot)85CGF-AEBKG KNIQ7-(Bot)0JZ8C-4TQBP DD4RL-(Bot)KL30H-A6DA7 MP00A-(Bot)BBR60-FY807 NYP4D-(Bot)L8IVP-GHIHE CJXHY-(Bot)XZFE9-DJ4ID QRG9Z-(Bot)X7Z2J-863J4 68NW7-(Bot)0RPPV-GJQWN PZA3Y-(Bot)36LQC-AEPD0 TG7EV-(Bot)0NRTN-VD05C J230A-(Bot)XC57I-HL0PW LWDZA-(Bot)9EPXY-IBZXH 4WXE0-(Bot)KYTJ6-50FYM Z5LIZ-(Bot)Y5RAH-ZV2HZ WKTKW-(Bot)GJPFN-2BBRW K9QQB-(Bot)BZNXX-DPZLW KX9VJ-(Bot)4V7Y3-MKCPC 3K2KL-(Bot)GFYNH-84BWI RHZ28-(Bot)0DZ5N-3Y6C3 TGI2C-(Bot)RTHIJ-EDT8Y

newsitems.title: Milestone Unlocked: 50,000 Wishlists! 🎉
newsitems.author: 笔下无江南
newsitems.contents: What’s up, Hardcore Gamers!Today is an absolutely incredible day for our development team—our game has officially surpassed 50,000 wishlists on Steam! 🎉Honestly, watching that number grow has been an emotional ride. Getting this far wouldn't have been possible without the attention, encouragement, and support from every single one of you. Without our amazing community, this game wouldn't be where it is today. On behalf of the entire dev team, I want to express my deepest gratitude!To celebrate this massive milestone and give back to the community that has our backs, we’ve put together a huge giveaway and a very special event!🎁 Drop #1: 20 Steam Keys (First Come, First Served!)Let's keep things simple and brutal. I’m dropping 20 game keys right here, right now. Grab them while you can:3V（bot）Y2R-39YW5-TA42QZGD69-ED（bot）TR3-PVI8XJFT9I-DQ（bot）BJK-9GBPDFP6L7-7TB（bot）CK-VR7XC5P67M-I（bot）MLR7-727VVYXDV0-5YK（bot）7H-245LZIMMH3-58（bot）C3N-X5C6WFWH8W-X7（bot）NEZ-3PGVTN23IF-4R（bot）40F-BAMYWIX02A-9D（bot）XBP-WIMG79GDRN-KQ（bot）I95-7KTI4MRKV2-KE4（bot）M2-E57Q2DWN03-IF9（bot）8T-T5KQY504XV-025（bot）KE-6MB9AXJ325-A6A（bot）H0-IB20XXVLJY-90Y（bot）IM-E767J4E5JX-I0D（bot）83-E0RB636HM3-ZJA（bot）EW-42JIAL58ZD-80F（bot）KT-B85W80I6PN-33W（bot）BN-NIGQM6GNRN-6HK（bot）AH-4PA2A⚠️ Friendly Reminder: If you manage to claim a key, PLEASE leave a comment below letting us know which number you took! This saves time for your fellow gamers so they aren't trying out used codes. Let's show that hardcore tactical courtesy!To prevent bots from stealing the keys, I have inserted (bot) in the middle of every code. Please make sure to delete (bot) before redeeming it!🎁 Drop #2: 88 Keys Raffle in the Comments!Were you too late for the fast drops? Don't worry, the hype doesn't stop there!I will be randomly selecting 88 lucky players from the comments section of this announcement to receive a free Steam key! 📌 How to enter: Just leave a comment below (tell us what you're excited about, what modes you want to play, or just say "awesome") If you win, I will add you as a friend on Steam and send the key directly via Direct Message!🔥 The Main Event: $666 Bounty for a NEW GAME NAME!As the scope of our game continues to expand—especially with the Raid Mode and the upcoming Co-op Horror Mode currently in development—I feel that our current working title doesn't fully capture the essence of our extreme realism, intense atmosphere, and the core bodycam experience.Therefore, I’m handing the naming rights over to the people who understand this game best: YOU! We are officially taking suggestions for a brand-new title!💰 The Bounty:$666 USDHow to participate: Drop your name ideas in the comments below! We highly recommend adding a brief sentence explaining the meaning or inspiration behind your suggestion.The Rule: If the name you suggest is officially chosen by our dev team to be the final title of the game, that $666 USD cash prize is yours!50,000 wishlists is just the beginning. We will keep grinding to polish the Raid Mode, Co-op Horror Mode, and more ultra-realistic maps to perfection. We are committed to repaying your trust with the most hardcore and authentic gunfight experience possible.Thank you once again for your incredible support. Drop your emails and your brilliant name ideas below! See you on the battlefield!

newsitems.title: A Letter to Our Players
newsitems.author: 笔下无江南
newsitems.contents: Hello everyone, we are the development team behind Bodycam Onrecord.As our release date approaches, we are both excited and nervous. Recently, we have noticed that many players, upon seeing the name Bodycam Onrecord, naturally associate it with two highly popular and excellent titles currently on the market: Bodycam and Unrecord. Some players even mistakenly believe we are a spin-off of one of these games, or a hastily renamed knock-off.To live up to every player's expectations and to protect the hard work we have poured into this project, we decided to be completely honest and clarify this matter before the launch.Regarding the origin of the name: A beautiful misunderstandingFrom the very first day this project was pitched, we finalized the name Bodycam Onrecord. Its original English meaning is very direct and pure - simply meaning that a body camera is currently recording. At that time, this phrase perfectly summarized the core visual experience we wanted to present to players.Now that the game is about to launch, this name carries all the development logs and effort we have accumulated from scratch. For a small team like ours, changing the name right before release is tantamount to cutting off our livelihood, so we decided to keep it. We are absolutely not trying to confuse anyone; we are merely sticking to our original concept.To prevent you from buying the wrong game, please read carefully:We know that players' money is hard-earned, and we do not want anyone to waste their money because they misread the title.If you are looking for the highly hardcore, slow-paced tactical shooter: please search for Bodycam on Steam. We are not that game. If you are looking for the viral, unreleased single-player story-driven tactical game: that is Unrecord. We are not that game either.So, what kind of game is Bodycam Onrecord exactly?Although we use the same bodycam perspective, our core gameplay and pacing are completely different from similar competing products on the market. In our game, you will experience:Highly realistic graphics and smooth controls: We are committed to creating a highly immersive visual presentation, but at the same time, we reject clunky controls. We pay great attention to the fluidity of movement, striving to make every weapon raise, sprint, and shot silky smooth.Exhilarating Killstreak mechanic (Our core difference!): Unlike the slow-paced tactical simulations on the market, we boldly integrated a more arcade-style, exhilarating Killstreak mechanic! Beneath the ultra-realistic graphics, you can still experience the traditional FPS thrill of unleashing skills after consecutive enemy kills and getting your adrenaline pumping!Rich game modes and maps: The launch version includes a variety of distinct map environments and gameplay modes to satisfy the combat needs of different players.Future Roadmap: Expanding deeply into Survival HorrorThis is just the beginning. In future version updates, our development focus will shift heavily towards the horror genre! Imagine this: under an ultra-realistic bodycam perspective, diving into the dark, facing the unknown and fear... This will be the unique experience we are dedicated to presenting to you in the future.If you have read the above and are interested in our unique combination of realistic visuals + exhilarating killstreaks + future horror expansion, we welcome you with open arms! But if you realize this is not the pure hardcore tactical simulation you are looking for, we also thank you for taking the time to read this announcement.As an indie development team, we may still have room for improvement in various aspects. If you encounter any bugs or have suggestions for improvement during your gameplay, please feel free to leave a message in the community. We will fix and update them as quickly as possible!Thank you to all the players who support indie games!
